name: Arsenicum Album
notes: Polychrest. Anxiety, restlessness, gastric complaints, burning pains relieved by warmth.

name: Belladonna
notes: Sudden onset fever, throbbing headache, red flushed face, dilated pupils.

name: Nux Vomica
notes: Digestive complaints, irritability, sedentary habits, overeating, constipation.

name: Sulphur
notes: Skin eruptions with itching and burning, unhealthy skin, morning diarrhoea.

name: Rhus Toxicodendron
notes: Joint stiffness better by motion, sprains, restlessness, herpetic eruptions.

name: Bryonia Alba
notes: Complaints worse by motion, dryness of mucous membranes, irritable, thirst for large quantities.

name: Pulsatilla Nigricans
notes: Mild yielding disposition, changeable symptoms, thirstlessness, worse warm room.

name: Lycopodium Clavatum
notes: Digestive weakness, bloating, right-sided complaints, 4-8 pm aggravation.

name: Phosphorus
notes: Respiratory complaints, burning pains, desire for cold drinks, sympathetic nature.

name: Sepia Officinalis
notes: Hormonal complaints, bearing-down sensations, indifference, worse before menses.

name: Calcarea Carbonica
notes: Constitutional remedy. Sweaty head, slow development, craving for eggs, obesity.

name: Natrum Muriaticum
notes: Grief, headaches, craving for salt, dryness, consolation aggravates.

name: Aconitum Napellus
notes: Sudden complaints after cold dry wind or fright, fear, restlessness, first stage of fever.

name: Apis Mellifica
notes: Oedematous swellings, stinging pains, urticaria, better cold applications.

name: Argentum Nitricum
notes: Anticipatory anxiety, flatulence, craving for sweets which aggravate, hurried feeling.

name: Gelsemium Sempervirens
notes: Influenza with drowsiness, dullness, dizziness, trembling; anticipatory fears.

name: Ignatia Amara
notes: Acute grief, sighing, globus sensation, contradictory symptoms, mood changes.

name: Chamomilla
notes: Teething children, extreme irritability, one cheek red one pale, better carried.

name: Hepar Sulphuris Calcareum
notes: Suppurating complaints, extreme sensitivity to cold and touch, croupy cough.

name: Mercurius Solubilis
notes: Ulcerations, offensive breath and sweat, salivation, worse night, creeping chilliness.

name: Silicea
notes: Suppuration, promotes expulsion of foreign bodies, lack of grit, offensive foot sweat.

name: Thuja Occidentalis
notes: Warts, ill effects of vaccination, fixed ideas, oily skin.

name: Cantharis
notes: Burning urination, cystitis, burns and scalds before blisters form.

name: Drosera Rotundifolia
notes: Spasmodic cough, whooping cough, worse after midnight, cough ends in retching.

name: Spongia Tosta
notes: Dry barking croupy cough like a saw through wood, better warm drinks.

name: Antimonium Tartaricum
notes: Rattling cough with little expectoration, drowsiness, pale sweaty face.

name: Ipecacuanha
notes: Persistent nausea not relieved by vomiting, clean tongue, haemorrhages bright red.

name: Kali Bichromicum
notes: Thick stringy ropy discharges, sinusitis, pain in small spots.

name: Ruta Graveolens
notes: Injuries to periosteum and tendons, eye strain, bruised soreness.

name: Arnica Montana
notes: Trauma, bruises, soreness after injury or overexertion, says nothing is wrong.

name: Hypericum Perforatum
notes: Injuries to nerve-rich parts, crushed fingers, shooting pains along nerves.

name: Ledum Palustre
notes: Puncture wounds, insect stings, cold applications relieve, ascending rheumatism.

name: Symphytum Officinale
notes: Fracture union, injuries to bone and periosteum, eye injuries from blunt objects.

name: Euphrasia Officinalis
notes: Bland coryza with acrid lachrymation, conjunctivitis, eye complaints.

name: Allium Cepa
notes: Acrid coryza with bland lachrymation, hay fever, worse warm room.

name: Colocynthis
notes: Cramping colicky pains better by bending double and hard pressure, after anger.

name: Magnesia Phosphorica
notes: Neuralgic cramping pains better by warmth and pressure, menstrual cramps.

name: Ferrum Phosphoricum
notes: First stage of inflammation and fever without marked characteristic symptoms.

name: Kali Muriaticum
notes: Second stage of inflammation, white discharges, eustachian tube blockage.

name: Natrum Phosphoricum
notes: Acidity, sour eructations, golden-yellow coated tongue, worms in children.

name: Natrum Sulphuricum
notes: Biochemic liver salt. Hepatic complaints, asthma worse in damp weather, head injury sequelae.

name: Calcarea Phosphorica
notes: Delayed dentition and walking, growing pains, desires smoked food.

name: Carbo Vegetabilis
notes: Flatulent distension, air hunger, wants to be fanned, collapse states.

name: China Officinalis
notes: Debility from loss of fluids, periodic fevers, painless bloating.

name: Cocculus Indicus
notes: Motion sickness, vertigo, ill effects of night watching and loss of sleep.

name: Dulcamara
notes: Complaints from damp cold weather or getting wet, autumnal diarrhoea.

name: Graphites
notes: Cracked skin with honey-like oozing, constipation, obesity with chilliness.

name: Kali Carbonicum
notes: Weakness, backache, 2-4 am aggravation, swelling of upper eyelids.

name: Petroleum
notes: Skin cracks worse in winter, motion sickness, herpetic eruptions.

name: Podophyllum Peltatum
notes: Profuse gushing painless diarrhoea, worse early morning, teething diarrhoea.

name: Staphysagria
notes: Ill effects of suppressed anger and indignation, clean cut wounds, styes.

name: Veratrum Album
notes: Copious vomiting and purging with cold sweat, collapse, craving for cold water.

name: Aloe Socotrina
notes: Urgent diarrhoea with insecurity of rectum, lumpy watery stools, haemorrhoids like grapes.

name: Baptisia Tinctoria
notes: Typhoid-like states, besotted appearance, offensive discharges, feels scattered.

name: Berberis Vulgaris
notes: Renal colic, radiating pains from kidney region, bubbling sensation.

name: Cactus Grandiflorus
notes: Constriction as of an iron band around heart, angina-like sensations.

name: Crataegus Oxyacantha
notes: Heart tonic used in mother tincture, cardiac weakness, irregular pulse.

name: Passiflora Incarnata
notes: Sleeplessness, restlessness, used in mother tincture for insomnia.

name: Avena Sativa
notes: Nerve tonic in mother tincture, debility after illness, sleeplessness.

name: Alfalfa
notes: General tonic in mother tincture, improves appetite and weight.

name: Syzygium Jambolanum
notes: Used in mother tincture for blood sugar management support.

name: Sac Lac
notes: Placebo pills of milk sugar with no active remedy. Doctors write SL for follow-up doses between active remedies. No potency applies.

name: Ratanhia Peruviana
notes: Anal fissures and piles with pain lasting hours after stool, like broken glass in rectum.

name: Aesculus Hippocastanum
notes: Blind painful piles with backache and dryness of rectum, purple haemorrhoids, venous stasis.

name: Collinsonia Canadensis
notes: Piles with obstinate constipation, sensation of sticks in rectum, often prescribed with Aesculus and Ratanhia.

name: Causticum
notes: Hoarseness, paralysis of single parts, urinary incontinence on coughing, ear noises, tinnitus.

name: Bellis Perennis
notes: Deep tissue injuries, bruised soreness of abdominal wall, sprains. Mother tincture often applied externally.

name: Phytolacca Berry
notes: Weight management and obesity support, usually as tablets or mother tincture for one-month courses.

name: Phytolacca Decandra
notes: Mastitis, sore throat with pain shooting to ears, glandular affections.

name: Calcarea Fluorica
notes: Biochemic bone-and-tissue salt. Hard glandular swellings, piles, bony growths. Doctors write 'CF 6X' or 'CF 6X comp(ound)'.

name: Kali Phosphoricum
notes: Biochemic nerve salt. Nervous exhaustion, weakness, poor memory, ear noises from nerve weakness. Written 'KP 6X'.

name: Thyroidinum
notes: Thyroid support and obesity, often 'Thyr 3X' tablets given 2-2-2 for a month.

name: Y-Lax
notes: Proprietary herbal laxative tablets for constipation, given as a days/weeks course (e.g. '15 in course'). Not a potentized remedy.

name: Bio-Combination Tablets
notes: Standard Indian biochemic combination tablets numbered B-1 to B-28 (e.g. B-16 nervous exhaustion, B-15 menstruation). Written as 'B-' followed by the number.

name: Five Phos
notes: General tonic combining the five phosphate biochemic salts, for weakness and debility.
